subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaid of God! The letter thou didst write hath arrived, and its contents were the cause of joy. Praised be God that in whatever spot thou hast reached
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه مرقوم رسید و مضمون سبب سرور گردید الحمد لله در هر نقطه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
